Arts Sports Clubs Community Outreach NCC Student Welfare library amenity center medical center hostel transport LIVELY AND HAPPY CAMPUS From the minute you set foot in our campus, you will feel an air of positivity, vibrancy and a gush of happiness. Sri Eshwar is a happening place, where students are always engaged in activities that cultivate their passion, spark their imagination and develop their personalities. It’s magical! A CAMPUS FULL OF POSITIVE VIBES. Corporate Ambience. Tranquil Greenery. Positive Vibes. Our campus ambience has a mix of stylish ‘corporate’ spaces amidst green landscape and an earthy at-home feel. Every inch of the campus is carefully designed to ensure that the students enjoy the best facilities and an inspiring ambience to gear themselves for a fantastic career ahead. The management of Sri Eshwar aims to give students high standards of infrastructure and ambience to enable them to perform to their fullest potential. These four crucial years of a student life, will not just be the most memorable years, but also a turning point that paves the way for their successful futures. STUDENT LEADERSHIP COUNCIL PEER LEADERS MAKE CAMPUS LIFE ENJOYABLE. Student Council is a fantastic opportunity for students to lead the various student verticals of their interest. By entrusting the full responsibility to the students to organize the events, we see that the outcomes are exceptional and they are able to organize the activities, much to the liking of their peers. Student Council leaders are directly mentored by the senior leadership team of Sri Eshwar. The objective of the SLC is to keep the campus vibrant and happy with many events and activities, all year round, that students can enjoy under the able leadership of their peers! KNOW MORE FINE ARTS LIFE IS A SONG. LIFE IS A DANCE. LIFE IS A CELEBRATION. If you have a keen interest in art forms like music, dance and other art forms, we are happy to provide opportunities and mentorship to further develop your interest and passion. We will provide you with many stages to perform and flaunt your prowess. SPORTS ETCHING STORIES OF CHAMPIONS! Our highly qualified and enthusiastic physical education department, will help you train and provide opportunities for your growth as a sportsperson. We provide the best facilities at Sri Eshwar to encourage and nurture your sportsmanship. KNOW MORE CLUBS ENERGETIC, LIKE-MINDED TEAMS WORKING TO MAKE A DIFFERENCE. Follow your passion and love for music, dance, theater, movies, media etc. At Sri Eshwar, like-minded students come together to revel in the joy of their passion together! You name it. We have it. If we don’t, we create it just for you. It’s as simple as that! Fine Arts Media Max Movie Club Tamil Mandram Sports Club Mentoring Toastmasters Grooming Fashion Club SESSWA Amenities Hostel Experience KNOW MORE NCC DOING OUR PART FOR OUR COUNTRY. JAI HIND! Established on 28 December 2020, the NCC Unit at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering functions under 2 (TN) CTC NCC, Coimbatore, with 50 SD/SW cadets. Led by Lt. M. Mahaboob (Assistant Professor, ECE), who trained at Officers Training Academy, Nagpur, the unit emphasizes discipline, leadership, and patriotism through rigorous NCC training. KNOW MORE COMMUNITY OUTREACH WE GAIN SOMETHING. WE CONTRIBUTE SOMETHING. WE GAIN EVEN MORE Today’s youth are so full of heart and love for the community. We help Eshwarites to foster a giving spirit, by transforming their ideas into actionable projects that help the community. Eshwarites actively volunteer in various initiatives that make a visible impact in the lives of the people we serve. KNOW MORE STUDENT WELFARE TAKING CARE OF OUR STUDENTS IS OUR NO.1 PRIORITY! At Sri Eshwar, we take the welfare, safety and health of our students very seriously. A dedicated team of highly qualified and experienced faculty are appointed to handle all aspects of Student Welfare. The committees under Student welfare, have protocols and guidelines and well equipped to handle the various aspects of student welfare, including anti-ragging awareness, student counseling, POSH or grievance redressal. KNOW MORE FESTIVAL CELEBRATIONS MODERN IN OUR OUTLOOK, YET SOAKED IN TRADITION While on one side, we rigorously train students to become technically advanced, we also take equal care to ensure our roots and traditions are never forgotten! Sri Eshwar celebrates many festivals throughout the year in full spirit and enthusiastic participation from faculty and students. KNOW MORE Flagship Events Inspiring Moments, Unforgettable Experiences Experience the vibrant spirit of Sri Eshwar through our signature events — a perfect blend of creativity, leadership, and teamwork. From exciting cultural fests and tech challenges to inspiring entrepreneurial gigs, these events make campus life truly unforgettable KNOW MORE LIBRARY AVID READERS. STOP HERE!​​ We have a vast collection of books just to captivate your interest and awaken your curiosity! Come into our library and lose yourself inside pages of imagination and information for as long as you like! KNOW MORE AMENITY CENTRE PAMPERING STUDENTS WITH LUXURY AND COMFORT Amenity Centre is a 16000 sq feet of space specially designed and built to help students relax after a day’s rigorous learning activities. The Amenity Centre is equipped with a multi-cuisine food court, separate salon for boys and girls, a well-stocked supermarket, indoor sports area, fully functional gym, music room with all musical instruments and a visitor guest house with separate dining areas. As the day winds down, the Amenity Centre is usually full of activity and life! KNOW MORE MEDICAL CENTRE CARE AT THE RIGHT TIME. Our state-of-the-art medical center provides comprehensive care and emergency services for students. The Medical Centre is equipped with all necessary equipment, four beds (2 in girls ward, 2 in boys ward), and staffed by a team of full time Doctor and two Staff nurses, ready to take care of students’ emergency needs. The facility is rightly located for quick accessibility, benefitting hostel dwellers and day scholars. With utmost care, the Centre ensures immediate attention in times of crisis. KNOW MORE HOSTEL MEMORABLE STAY. MEMORIES FOR LIFETIME!​ First time away from the comfort of your home? No worries! At Sri Eshwar, we understand that your comfort, security, and a feeling of positivity is paramount. Our hostel facility and fellow hostellers will make you feel at home in no time, and you will leave at the end of four years with cherished memories for a lifetime. We ensure our hostels are safe and secure with 24 hours round the clock surveillance and heightened security measures. Sri Eshwar Hostel is comfortable in every way to make the student learning experience peaceful and enjoyable. KNOW MORE TRANSPORT Bus facility is provided to all day scholars attending from Coimbatore, Pollachi, Tirupur, Udumalpet, Negamum and nearby areas. Routes will be optimized to enable quickest transfer of students to and from the college. Sri Eshwar is also accessible by Public Buses with a convenient bus stop right outside the college.
